So typically one of the things that we do, so a sandbox, really what a sandbox is, is a micro VM.
So an environment, which is essentially a VM that's the most better version possible of a VM that is able to spawn much faster than a traditional VM.
But that is also fully isolated because that's a premise where you can run any kind of code and you have no risk that anything escapes from that.
Which is very important because if you're running LMs, then the LMs have a way to escape because, you know, they know everything much more than humans.
So when you try to do it yourself or when you use competitors...
The problem that you're going to hit is the problem of the life cycle of the sandbox.
You create it and then stuff happens.
run code, you generate files and everything.
You start maybe, there's an app that gets created.
And then what happens?
Okay, does the server stay up?
Or I guess, does the sandbox stay up?
So it starts consuming compute for you.
If it does, then it's expensive.
But if you turn it off, then that's annoying.
You have to manually turn it off after you stop using it.
And then you need to turn it back on.
know, like, let's say the end user connects back to the project four hours later.
And then you need to restart it.
So that takes some time.
You have cold starts.
I guess all of this annoying life cycle that's super annoying to manage and where you have to sort of, you know, build heavy infra around it to either not have crazy ballooning costs or...
Have crazy high cold starts.
The way that we did it is we said, okay, you know, we're going to manage all of this for you.
You're going to have a fully automated lifecycle.
The sandboxes, as soon as you stop connecting to it, as soon as you literally drop the connection to the sandbox, we take a snapshot of what's going on in there.
So the whole memory, and we put it in standby.
And so it's not costing you any money compute wise.
We do charge for storage, but that's much smaller.
So it says in standby, and then as soon as you reconnect to it, as if you never turned it off, we will restart it in 25 milliseconds.
So we have sort of this number that we keep repeating of the 25 milliseconds that we really like.
Because we snapshot the entire memory, so we're able to resume the sandbox exactly how it was.
So that's one of the key things where, and, you know, part of the problem that we have with education is that we don't make it clear enough that you get this.
So people call it.
And they're like, oh, but how do I turn it on, turn them off and turn them on?
Like, no, this is handled for you.
This whole life cycle is handled for you.
And I think that allows people to achieve really, really good latency for a fraction of the price.
I think that's one of the main things.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the Blaxel \<\> GrowthX content engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blaxel's "perpetual sandbox" platform** offers near-instant (25ms) resume times by snapshotting memory to standby storage, eliminating cold starts and high compute costs.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
  - [**The primary challenge is low visibility.** Blaxel's superior tech is unknown, causing them to lose deals to "build it yourself" projects or better-known competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
  - [**GrowthX will build trust and mindshare** by creating educational content for decision-makers (VPs of Eng) to establish Blaxel as the authority on production-grade AI agent infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
  - [**Success is defined by content quality and mindshare.** Initial KPIs will focus on traffic and signups, with the goal of making Blaxel synonymous with running AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=3275.0)

## Topics

### Blaxel's Challenge: Low Visibility & Market Education

  - [Blaxel's core problem is low visibility, not product inferiority.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
      - [**Competitors:** Have more mindshare and appear higher in search results.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2024.0)
      - [**"Build it Yourself" Projects:** A common alternative, especially for companies with high compliance overhead.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
  - [The market needs education on the complexities of production-grade AI agent infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
      - [**The Pitch:** Blaxel highlights the hidden costs and risks of DIY (scaling, reliability, security) to make the value of a managed service clear.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [The long-term vision is that latency will be the key differentiator for agents, mirroring the web's evolution.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [Blaxel's platform is designed to provide the sustainable speed required for agents to win in the future.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

### Blaxel's Solution: The Perpetual Sandbox Platform

  - [**Core Product:** A "perpetual sandbox" platform providing micro-VMs for AI agents to run code.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [**Automated Sandbox Lifecycle:**](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
          - [**Problem:** Manual lifecycle management leads to high compute costs or slow cold starts.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
          - [**Solution:** Sandboxes snapshot to standby storage (compute-free) when inactive and resume in **25 milliseconds** when reconnected.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
      - [**Co-Hosting:** Host the AI agent itself on Blaxel's backbone for near-zero network latency.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [**High-Touch Support:** A dedicated Slack channel for each customer provides real-time, technical support.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
      - [**Advanced Features:** Fully managed custom domains (one-click setup) and other production-grade tools.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

### Customer Profile & Buying Journey

  - [**ICP:** AI startups and scale-ups building agents that run code.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [**User:** Technical roles (Software Engineers, Product Engineers).](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [**Buyer:** VP of Engineering, Head of Engineering, or Director of Engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [**Buying Moments:**](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
      - [**1. New Infrastructure Setup (2/3 of customers):** Adopting a vendor for a new GenAI product.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)
      - [**2. Vendor Switch (1/3 of customers):** Switching from a competitor due to reliability issues (e.g., Webflow).](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)

### Content Strategy & Workflow

  - [**GrowthX's Role:** Create educational content for decision-makers (VPs of Eng, CEOs) to build trust and mindshare.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
  - [**Internal Technical Writer:** Focuses on deep-dive engineering blog posts (e.g., Fly.io style) to build credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=3105.0)
  - [**Content Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
      - [**Initial Phase:** GrowthX will work directly with Nicolas and Paul for content calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
      - [**Long-Term Goal:** A streamlined process with minimal review before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2794.0)
  - [**Blog Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2865.0)
      - [**Option 1 (Preferred):** A single blog with tags to differentiate content types.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=3084.0)
      - [**Option 2 (Alternative):** A separate "Guides" section for GrowthX content, mirroring the Augment Co. model.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=2865.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=3154.0)
      - [Schedule a 5-minute publishing deep dive with Nicolas.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=3154.0)
      - [Deliver discovery artifacts (ICP, personas, etc.) this week.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=3672.0)
      - [Schedule a recurring weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=3672.0)
  - [**Blaxel:**](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
      - [Provide examples of great content in the agentic space.](https://fathom.video/share/qc2pM6cpdpD9W2q7ih_4Xwny8x7H227L?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

action_items.description: Send George examples of great agent-infra content/education
Schedule publishing deep dive w/ Nico; then conduct session
Send Slack follow-up to Nico & Paul re: meeting notes + next steps
Schedule weekly sync w/ Nico & Paul
